---
title: "Report"
output: 
  bookdown::html_document2: default
---

This is a testing report to host figures


```{r setup, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(here)
# Set global options for code chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE)

# Convenient variables
fig_path <- here("results/figures")
# Figs on real dataset
comp_time_real <- here(fig_path, "fig_computational_time_real.png")
feat_sel_real <- here(fig_path, "fig_feature_selection_real.png")
perf_real <- here(fig_path, "fig_performance_evaluation_real.png")
# Figs on sim dataset
comp_time_sim <- here(fig_path, "fig_computational_time_sim.png")
feat_sel_sim <- here(fig_path, "fig_feature_selection_sim.png")
perf_sim <- here(fig_path, "fig_performance_evaluation_sim.png")
```
## Real Datasets

```{r plot-comp-time-real}
include_graphics(comp_time_real)
```

```{r plot-feat-sel-real}
include_graphics(feat_sel_real)
```

```{r plot-perf-real}
include_graphics(perf_real)
```


## Simulated Datasets


```{r plot-comp-time-sim}
include_graphics(comp_time_sim)
```

```{r plot-feat-sel-sim}
include_graphics(feat_sel_sim)
```

```{r plot-perf-sim}
include_graphics(perf_sim)
```
